brief_title: Tumor-directed Radiation Therapy for Patients With the Highest Risk Category of Localized Prostate Cancer
official_title: Real-time Image-guided Ultra-hypofractionated Focal Boost to Intraprostatic Lesion(s) With Lymph Node Irradiation for a Very High High-risk Localized Prostate Cancer (the HYPO-RT-PC Boost Trial)
